nasb.text: When they finished apportioning the land for inheritance by its borders, the sons of Israel gave an inheritance in their midst to Joshua the son of Nun.

esv.text: When they had finished distributing the several territories of the land as inheritances, the people of Israel gave an inheritance among them to Joshua the son of Nun.

cnv.text: 以色列人按著疆界把地分完了之後，就在他們中間把產業分給嫩的兒子約書亞。

ccb.text: 以色列各族把地分配完毕以后，又从中划出土地给嫩的儿子约书亚。
